title: Fix workflow guards — explicit skip==false conditions
q_summary: Actions still failing after guard fix — push corrected workflow.
a_summary: Identified two bugs: (1) find command could exit non-zero if turn-bundles dir missing entirely; (2) all downstream if: conditions used != 'true' which passes when output is empty string. Fixed by adding explicit directory existence check before find, and changing all downstream gates from skip != 'true' to skip == 'false' so they only run when explicitly set.
decisions: Directory existence check added before find command
All downstream step conditions changed from skip != 'true' to skip == 'false'
Added || true to find pipe as extra safety net
